### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] feat(llm): implement model-centric architecture with protocol-prefix dispatching
summary:
#### **Summary**
This PR introduces a major architectural evolution to the LLM proxy: a **model-centric configuration approach**. By decoupling agent logic from specific providers, we now support adding new LLM providers simply by specifying a `protocol/model_id` format—**zero code changes required
